'''鈭歡-n-th-ch''' ('''kaganthechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mop|mop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mop|mop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-n-th-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kaganthechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiganthechoko|thiganthechoko]] || [[word:jiganthechoko|jiganthechoko]] || [[word:shiganthechoko|shiganthechoko]] || [[word:kiganthechoko|kiganthechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuganthechoko|thuthuganthechoko]] || [[word:jujuganthechoko|jujuganthechoko]] || [[word:shushuganthechoko|shushuganthechoko]] || [[word:kukuganthechoko|kukuganthechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuganthechoko|thuganthechoko]] || [[word:juganthechoko|juganthechoko]] || [[word:shuganthechoko|shuganthechoko]] || [[word:kuganthechoko|kuganthechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuganthechoko|thuganthechoko]] || [[word:juganthechoko|juganthechoko]] || [[word:shuganthechoko|shuganthechoko]] || [[word:kuganthechoko|kuganthechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theganthechoko|theganthechoko]] || [[word:jeganthechoko|jeganthechoko]] || [[word:sheganthechoko|sheganthechoko]] || [[word:keganthechoko|keganthechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoganthechoko|thothoganthechoko]] || [[word:jojoganthechoko|jojoganthechoko]] || [[word:shoshoganthechoko|shoshoganthechoko]] || [[word:kokoganthechoko|kokoganthechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoganthechoko|thoganthechoko]] || [[word:joganthechoko|joganthechoko]] || [[word:shoganthechoko|shoganthechoko]] || [[word:koganthechoko|koganthechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoganthechoko|thoganthechoko]] || [[word:joganthechoko|joganthechoko]] || [[word:shoganthechoko|shoganthechoko]] || [[word:koganthechoko|koganthechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ganthechoko|th忙ganthechoko]] || [[word:j忙ganthechoko|j忙ganthechoko]] || [[word:sh忙ganthechoko|sh忙ganthechoko]] || [[word:k忙ganthechoko|k忙ganthechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaganthechoko|thaganthechoko]] || [[word:jaganthechoko|jaganthechoko]] || [[word:shaganthechoko|shaganthechoko]] || [[word:kaganthechoko|kaganthechoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
